name: pantry-cook-suggestions
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.suggestions.every(s => typeof s.haveCount === 'number' && typeof s.totalCount === 'number')
output.ok === false || output.result.suggestions.every(s => s.haveCount >= 0 && s.haveCount <= s.totalCount)
_note: cooking.pantry-cook-suggestions ranks the caller's recipes by what fraction of each recipe's ingredients the pantry covers (haveCount/totalCount → coveragePct, descending). An empty pantry returns ok:true with an empty suggestions array + a CTA message (never an error). Only recipes with haveCount>0 are returned. State-backed, per-user. Path-3 LENS_ACTIONS macro; the coverage-ranking math (2 of 3 → 67%) is pinned in server/tests/cooking-lens-macros.test.js.
